inputs.label: Magnitude (r)
inputs.businessContext: Polar form magnitude of complex number

inputs.label: Angle unit (0=rad, 1=deg)
inputs.businessContext: Select 0 for radians or 1 for degrees

inputs.label: Exponent (n)
inputs.businessContext: Power to which the complex number is raised

inputs.label: Decimal places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for output

formulas.real: Math.round(power * cosNTheta * Math.pow(10, decimals)) / Math.pow(10, decimals)
formulas.imag: Math.round(power * sinNTheta * Math.pow(10, decimals)) / Math.pow(10, decimals)
